name: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk
summary: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, provides financial, and car rental and related services in Indonesia. The company offers various financing services; and vehicle rental, trucking, driver, and inspection services. It also sells fuel. The company was formerly known as PT Multi Tambang Abadi and changed its name to PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk in February 2013. PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk.
